title: DeploySignal
intent: DORA metrics, deployment risk scoring, and release guardrails
requirements: deployments module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
risk-scoring module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
dora-metrics module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
rollbacks module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
windows module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
reports module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
